data.title: CI-hook-tests: CLAUDE.md references review-gate-allowlist -> test-review-gate-allowlist.sh fails
data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-review-gate-allowlist.sh fails with: 'CLAUDE.md references review-gate-allowlist'. The test validates that the allowlist is not leaked into user-facing documentation.

## Expected Behavior
CLAUDE.md should not reference internal review gate allowlist implementation details.

## Actual Behavior
CLAUDE.md contains a reference to 'review-gate-allowlist' which the test considers a leak of internal implementation.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Hook Tests job: 10 pass, 1 fail.
